entities.description: As a subsection of the main paper 'BookRAG: A Hierarchical Structure-aware Index-based Approach for Retrieval-Augmented Generation on Complex Documents', this section details the proposed agent-based query method inspired by Information Foraging Theory, which dynamically classifies queries and employs a tailored retrieval workflow.
Refers to the specific retrieval strategy introduced in section 5, which utilizes agents to dynamically classify queries based on Information Foraging Theory.
The theoretical framework inspiring the design of the agent-based query method described in section 5.

relations.description: The 'Agent-Based Query Method' is the primary technical contribution and topic detailed within section 5.
'Information Foraging Theory' serves as the foundational inspiration for the methods discussed in section 5.
